hero.name: Dalia Hossam
hero.lead: A final-year fashion design student working across garment construction, digital pattern-making and brand storytelling — most recently as the founder of Dibaj.

about.quote: Fashion is a conversation between aesthetics, function and detail — every garment is a small decision made visible.
paragraphs: Dalia approaches fashion as a conversation between aesthetics, function and detail. Her work is shaped by a steady curiosity — for new techniques, new silhouettes, and the small decisions that make a garment feel considered rather than generic.

She is currently completing her degree at the Faculty of Applied Arts, Fashion Design Department, Helwan University, where her training spans garment construction, digital design and presentation. Alongside her studies, she founded Dibaj, an independent fashion label, and recently presented her own work on the runway at Cairo Fashion Show 2026.

education.title: B.A. in Fashion Design
education.institution: Faculty of Applied Arts, Fashion Department — Helwan University

craft.description: The software Dalia designs, renders and presents with — and the habits that hold a project together from concept to runway.

experience.title: Cairo Fashion Show 2026
experience.description: Presented original designs on the runway, gaining first-hand experience in show production, presentation and styling.

experience.title: Al Nasser Textile Factory — Training Programme
experience.description: Worked across the production floor to learn garment manufacturing, fabric handling and quality control from the inside out.

experience.title: Dibaj — ديباچ — Founder
experience.description: Runs an independent fashion label on Instagram, overseeing everything from design selection and sourcing to marketing and customer relationships.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.description: Open to collaborations, internships and made-to-order commissions. Reach out by email or phone, or follow the journey on Instagram.
